# Tables Fixture

## Pipe Table

| Fruit      | Season | Color  |
|------------|--------|--------|
| Apple      | Autumn | Red    |
| Mango      | Summer | Orange |
| Strawberry | Spring | Red    |

## Grid Table

+------------+--------+-------------------------------+
| Fruit      | Season | Notes                         |
+============+========+===============================+
| Apple      | Autumn | Crisp and tart.               |
|            |        | Great for pies and cider.     |
+------------+--------+-------------------------------+
| Mango      | Summer | Sweet and tropical.           |
|            |        | Best eaten fresh or in        |
|            |        | smoothies.                    |
+------------+--------+-------------------------------+
| Strawberry | Spring | Small but flavorful.          |
|            |        | Perfect for desserts.         |
+------------+--------+-------------------------------+

## HTML Table

<table>
<tr><th>Fruit</th><th colspan="2">Availability</th></tr>
<tr><td>Apple</td><td>Autumn</td><td>Widely grown</td></tr>
<tr><td>Mango</td><td>Summer</td><td>Tropical regions</td></tr>
<tr><td>Strawberry</td><td>Spring</td><td>Temperate climates</td></tr>
</table>
